platforms.requiredProductionVerification: App Store Server API or verified StoreKit transaction path
Google Play Developer API purchase token verification

serverSideRules: Never trust client-only entitlement state for production unlocks.
Verify product ID, transaction token, platform, purchase state, expiration, revocation/refund, and grace-period state server-side.
Persist entitlement state using an anonymous parent/device/account key, not child identity.
Return entitlement state to apps through the existing /v1/purchases/sync response shape.
